nodes.label: DHK · Session Layer
nodes.description: Dave Holmes-Kinsella — practitioner-thinker building the session layer before it had a name. adventures-in-ai repo, 8 production skills, 1 year in service.

nodes.label: Session Layer
nodes.title: The Session Layer
nodes.description: Nobody has published skills for how to run a day with Claude. No captain's log, no day planning, no context continuity across sessions. The stickiest use case is the most underdeveloped.
nodes.who_lives_here: Knowledge workers, operators, analysts — anyone who uses Claude daily but isn't a developer
nodes.dhk_claim: DHK has a working implementation. This is the reference territory.

nodes.label: Personal OS
nodes.title: Claude as Personal OS
nodes.description: Skills that manage a person's entire workflow — email triage, reading lists, briefings, day close. Not one skill, but an orchestrated system. Nobody has published this as a coherent pattern.
nodes.who_lives_here: Power users who want Claude embedded in their daily rhythm, not just their task list
nodes.dhk_claim: DHK's adventures-in-ai repo is the only known public implementation.

nodes.label: Skill Discovery
nodes.title: Skill Registry & Discovery
nodes.description: No canonical discovery layer exists. Multiple competing awesome lists with no quality signal, no search, no way to find the right skill for a job. The npm problem, unsolved.
nodes.who_lives_here: Everyone who has ever searched GitHub for 'claude skills' and found 12 different lists
nodes.dhk_claim: This map is the start of the answer.

nodes.label: Skill Evaluation
nodes.title: Skill Evaluation & Testing
nodes.description: No standard way to measure whether a skill outperforms a raw prompt. No eval harness. No benchmark. People ship skills on vibes and hope.
nodes.who_lives_here: Anyone who has wondered if their skill is actually helping or just adding tokens
nodes.dhk_claim: Anthropic needs to build this. The community is waiting.

nodes.label: Healthcare & Life Sciences
nodes.title: Healthcare & Life Sciences
nodes.description: One of the largest enterprise verticals for AI adoption. Zero published skills in the corpus. HIPAA, HL7, FHIR, prior auth, formulary — all dark matter.
nodes.who_lives_here: Health tech engineers, clinical informaticists, prior auth automation builders
nodes.dhk_claim: DHK works in healthcare AI at Infinitus. This is the next territory.
